_meta: TODO: professional translation review required (Ewe). Placeholder strings retain {variable} tokens.
spam_call_warning: Nuxlɔ̃ame: Ka sia ate ŋu anye nya manyatalenu (spam).
spam_sms_warning: Nuxlɔ̃ame: SMS sia ate ŋu anye nya manyatalenu (spam).
otp_fraud_warning: Èle OTP xɔm tso ga gbɔ esi nèle ka me. Ate ŋu anye amebamame. Mègagblɔ kodea na ame aɖeke o.
url_blocked: Míetu wɛbsaiti sia ɖe wò dedienɔnɔ ta.
fraud_alert: Míekpɔ nuwɔna manyatalenuwo le wò akɔnta dzi.
send_with_care_prompt: Míalé ga sia ɖe asi simma {duration}. Àte ŋu axe ɣekaɣi ko.
return_to_sender_confirm: Da asi ɖe edzi: Míatrɔ GHS {amount} ɖe {recipient} ŋu.
diky_step1: Míekpɔ nuwɔna deyiɖeka. Ènya {recipient} si le ga la xɔm la?
diky_step2: Da asi ɖe edzi: Wò ŋutɔe ɖe mɔ na ga {amount} GHS sia ɖoɖoa?
diky_step3: Mlɔeɖoɖo. Ŋlɔ ƐƐ ne nèdi ɖoɖoa, alo AO be miatso.
ask_me_first_prompt: Wò ŋutɔe ɖe mɔ na ga GHS {amount} sia dɔdɔa?
verified_business_badge: Dɔwɔƒe si me wokpɔ asi le: {business_name}
passive_protection_enrolled: Wò ka le dedienɔnɔ me. Ŋlɔ STOP be nàdo le eme.
transaction_held: Míele wò ga ɖoɖo la kpɔm ɖe wò dedienɔnɔ ta.
block_confirmed: Míetu fonu {msisdn}. Ŋlɔ UNBLOCK be miagbugbɔe aʋu.
